title: China Ga/Ge/Sb export-control suspension expires
desc: The single biggest date in the chokepoint complex. Re-imposition would be a step-function up for gallium/germanium/antimony-exposed substrate & optical names; permanent removal compresses the scarcity premium.

title: NVIDIA Rubin Ultra + HBM4 ramp window
desc: Next-gen accelerator ramp pulls HBM4 and advanced packaging. Watch memory + CoWoS suppliers.

title: HBM4E ramp + advanced-packaging inflection
desc: HBM4E and hybrid-bonding capacity become the choke. Memory and packaging names in focus.

title: Glass-core substrate mass production
desc: T-glass undersupplied until ~2028; Corning + substrate ramps. Intel/Microsoft glass-substrate triangulation.
